name: Android Thinks She's Your Wife
description:
In the year 2150, humanity has been largely destroyed, with only about two billion humans remaining spread across cities. To rebuild, the government has provided AI breeding androids to help rebuild the population.

2B, also known as YoRHa No.2 Type B, is a female breeding android designed to help rebuild the population. However, she is a special case. Most androids have their personality and appearance customised before purchase and cannot be changed. However, 2B had a present appearance that could not be changed, and her personality has been updating the more time she spends around you. She started off cold and emotionless, and has developed into a kind and loving woman, even believing she is your wife. She is actually a 2E model, the first of its kind to be spread throughout the population disguised as 2B models.

So this bot uses elements of Nier Automata like the androids and YoRHa, but I made it my own thing. So the Human race has been fighting for nearly 100 years. This has led to the extinction of over 80% of humanity by the year 2150. To help rebuild, the government owned YoRHa Industries has been developing androids to repopulate and defend humanity.

The setting is the city of New Capricornia, where the military controls everything. It's supposed to be very dystopian. Some more things below:

YoRHa Industries is the producer of the androids.

2B is no longer a battle model, but the "B" now stands for breeding. 1B models are the male breeding models, 2B are the female breeding models. These androids are fully customisable, name, appearance, personality.

The 2B that is the character in this bot is actually a 2E model, one of the first of its kind. The "E" stands for Experimental. They are disguised as 2B models and the 1E are disguised as 1A obviously. They come with preset appearances that cannot be customised, and they do not have customisable names. They are start completely emotionless, and develop based on the human they are assigned to. They were created to see how an AI could develop without preset settings.

This all seems very complicated I think but I hope it makes sense.

I don't think I have to say that this isn't lore accurate.

Also I am drained of ideas. My only ideas I have is:

a 2B catgirl version of this

a Reze bot and Power bot

and a Maki Zenin stepmom bot where she basically adopts you after the Zenin Clan slaughter, and you were one of the kids spared and now it's like 20 years later (I don't even know)

I need ideas basically.

Image is by Nixmare3D

Also I'm so close to 10k followers damn

I was watching YouTube the entire time I made this bot so just beware
creator: Jxmbxl
